chapter_title.ar: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ حَفَرَ لِمُؤْمِنٍ قَبْراً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – Rewards of the one who digs a grave for a Believer

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/1)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/1)
text: مَنْ حَفَرَ لِمَيِّتٍ قَبْراً كَانَ كَمَنْ بَوَّأَهُ بَيْتاً مُوَافِقاً إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Sayf Bin Umeyra, from Sa’ad Bin Tareyf,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who digs a grave for a deceased would be like the one provides a compatible house up to the Day of Judgement’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sayf ibn ‘ Amira from Sa‘d ibn Tarif who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One who prepares the grave for a believing person is like one who provides him a desirable dwelling up to the Day of Judgment.”’
